'''鈭歯-sh-l''' ('''nashala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallslam|wallslam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallslam|wallslam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-sh-l
|-
! Lemma
| nashala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nashalithi|nashalithi]] || [[word:nashaliji|nashaliji]] || [[word:nashalishi|nashalishi]] || [[word:nashali|nashali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashaluthuth|nashaluthuth]] || [[word:nashalujuj|nashalujuj]] || [[word:nashalushush|nashalushush]] || [[word:nashal|nashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashaluthu|nashaluthu]] || [[word:nashaluju|nashaluju]] || [[word:nashalushu|nashalushu]] || [[word:nashalu|nashalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashalufuth|nashalufuth]] || [[word:nashalufuj|nashalufuj]] || [[word:nashalufush|nashalufush]] || [[word:nashaluf|nashaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nashalethe|nashalethe]] || [[word:nashaleje|nashaleje]] || [[word:nashaleshe|nashaleshe]] || [[word:nashale|nashale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashalothoth|nashalothoth]] || [[word:nashalojoj|nashalojoj]] || [[word:nashaloshosh|nashaloshosh]] || [[word:nashal|nashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashalotho|nashalotho]] || [[word:nashalojo|nashalojo]] || [[word:nashalosho|nashalosho]] || [[word:nashalo|nashalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashalofoth|nashalofoth]] || [[word:nashalofoj|nashalofoj]] || [[word:nashalofosh|nashalofosh]] || [[word:nashalof|nashalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nashal忙th忙|nashal忙th忙]] || [[word:nashal忙j忙|nashal忙j忙]] || [[word:nashal忙sh忙|nashal忙sh忙]] || [[word:nashal忙|nashal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashalathath|nashalathath]] || [[word:nashalajaj|nashalajaj]] || [[word:nashalashash|nashalashash]] || [[word:nashal|nashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashalatha|nashalatha]] || [[word:nashalaja|nashalaja]] || [[word:nashalasha|nashalasha]] || [[word:nashala|nashala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashalafath|nashalafath]] || [[word:nashalafaj|nashalafaj]] || [[word:nashalafash|nashalafash]] || [[word:nashalaf|nashalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nashalasha|nashalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonashalasha|gonashalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinashalasha|gokinashalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nashaln眉sha|nashaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonashalnkn眉sha|gonashalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinashaln眉sha|gokinashaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nashalsh毛sha|nashalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonashalnksh毛sha|gonashalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinashalsh毛sha|gokinashalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nashalrosha|nashalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonashalnkrosha|gonashalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinashalrosha|gokinashalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nashalmusha|nashalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonashalnkmusha|gonashalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashalmusha|gokinashalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nashalsherasha|nashalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonashalnksherasha|gonashalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinashalsherasha|gokinashalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nashalngasha|nashalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonashalnkngasha|gonashalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinashalngasha|gokinashalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nashalyasha|nashalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonashalnkyasha|gonashalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinashalyasha|gokinashalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nashalyamasha|nashalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonashalnkyamasha|gonashalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinashalyamasha|gokinashalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nashaln眉sh毛sha|nashaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonashalnkn眉sh毛sha|gonashalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinashaln眉sh毛sha|gokinashaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nashaln眉rosha|nashaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonashalnkn眉rosha|gonashalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinashaln眉rosha|gokinashaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashaln眉musha|nashaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonashalnkn眉musha|gonashalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashaln眉musha|gokinashaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nashalsh毛n眉sha|nashalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonashalnksh毛n眉sha|gonashalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinashalsh毛n眉sha|gokinashalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nashalsh毛rosha|nashalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonashalnksh毛rosha|gonashalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinashalsh毛rosha|gokinashalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashalsh毛musha|nashalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonashalnksh毛musha|gonashalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashalsh毛musha|gokinashalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nashalron眉sha|nashalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonashalnkron眉sha|gonashalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinashalron眉sha|gokinashalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nashalrosh毛sha|nashalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonashalnkrosh毛sha|gonashalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinashalrosh毛sha|gokinashalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nashalromusha|nashalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonashalnkromusha|gonashalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinashalromusha|gokinashalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nashalmun眉sha|nashalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonashalnkmun眉sha|gonashalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinashalmun眉sha|gokinashalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nashalmush毛sha|nashalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonashalnkmush毛sha|gonashalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinashalmush毛sha|gokinashalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nashalmurosha|nashalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonashalnkmurosha|gonashalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinashalmurosha|gokinashalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nashal|nashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙sh忙l|n忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honashal|honashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙sh忙l|hon忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonashal|hohonashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙sh忙l|hohon忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nashal|n眉nashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙sh忙l|n眉n忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nashal|n眉n眉nashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙sh忙l|n眉n眉n忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nashal|n茂nashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙sh忙l|n茂n忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nashal|n茂n茂nashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙sh忙l|n茂n茂n忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunashal|lunashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙sh忙l|lun忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunashal|lulunashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙sh忙l|lulun忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linashal|linashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙sh忙l|lin忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinashal|lilinashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙sh忙l|lilin忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konashal|konashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙sh忙l|kon忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonashal|kokonashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙sh忙l|kokon忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenashal|kenashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙sh忙l|ken忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenashal|kekenashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙sh忙l|keken忙sh忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
